## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss performance reports, content strategies, and scaling vendor pages.](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Block pages showing declining performance; potentially due to LLM overviews](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Tuning pages experiencing volatility; team to monitor for another week](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Zero traffic pages refresh to begin; Matt taking over project management](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Vendor pages scaling discussed; aiming for significant expansion (potentially 400+ URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Current workflow limitations identified; GrowthX moving to custom platform in weeks to enable scaling](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

## Topics

### Performance Reports Analysis

  - [Block pages: Declining performance (185 pages across 2,600 keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Drastic drop in clicks, potentially due to LLM overviews](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [More data needed for deeper analysis](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Tuning pages:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [GA4 shows dip, GSC data volatile with impression spike](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [No significant drops for individual pages](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [Team to monitor for another week before further action](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Second batch tuning pages:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Post-refresh showing improvement (more sessions/views/clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Performance not "super exciting" but better than pre-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Treasury pages:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Higher performance this week (sessions and views up)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Liquidity position report page top performer (\~30 views, 10-15 sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Performance hovering around 25-26 sessions, \~100 views](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Upward trend over past four weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Zero traffic pages refresh:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Matt taking over project management](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [Team to start with low-traffic pages](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Process: Create separate Airtable tab, use go/no-go system for potential cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Best bank pages: No further edits needed on Ramp's site](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Victoria updated statuses for CMS addition](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Main page to be added in upcoming batch](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [Data wrapper ID to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### Scaling Vendor Pages

  - [Goal: Significantly expand vendor page footprint (potentially 400+ URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Current max output: \~22-23 pages/week](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Limitations:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [Content review overhead due to repetitive section generation](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Aerox platform constraints (one-by-one page creation)](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Potential solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [GrowthX moving to custom platform in weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Possibility of building custom workflow for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
      - [Exploring bulk generation options to reduce manual work](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Sanity CMS structure allows section reuse, but content still produced individually](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Team considering new workflow to reduce content review time](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Exploring possibilities of API integration with Sanity for direct publishing](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [GrowthX to internally review processes for potential bulk generation methods](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to send list of zero traffic page URLs to Matt for review](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Victoria to provide data wrapper ID for vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [GrowthX team to begin vendor page additions to CMS by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Luke to provide more specific target number for vendor page scaling](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore custom workflow options with engineering team for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Team to test batch processing of "a couple hundred" vendor pages in shorter timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [GrowthX transitioning to custom platform in coming weeks to enable better scaling](https://fathom.video/share/6i74Pp75z3yyGa_W3Rd79QsLXcmb46-d?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
